modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Use `V(vin, vgnd)` as input and drive `V(vout, vgnd)` as output.
Pass the input linearly for `0.0 V <= V(vin, vgnd) <= 0.4 V`.
Below 0.0 V, apply an exponential soft lower limit that approaches -0.2 V with a 0.2 V softness span.
Above 0.4 V, apply an exponential soft upper limit that approaches 0.6 V with a 0.2 V softness span.

title: Soft Voltage Clamp
